visa_types.name: Multi Entry Long Term Visa : 60 Days
visa_types.documents_required:
- Nigerian nationals who hold a Tourist visa / Residence visa for any third country and intend to visit Dubai, must apply for and obtain their Dubai visa before departing Nigeria to the third country.
- Visa Application form duly filled must include an accurate address in the UAE, valid contact number and email address for the passenger.
- A photocopy of the confirmed onward or return Emirates ticket along with the passenger’s name with the arrival and return dates. It must match the dates on the hotel reservation. The passenger’s name and the period of stay should be highlighted in Yellow when submitting the ticket for visa application.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the main (bio) page of the Ordinary/Normal Passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period.
- The visa application form must include an accurate address in the UAE, valid contact number and email address for the passenger.
- For Non-Nigerian Nationals – Colour Copy of the valid CERPAC and residence Permit Visa.
- Applicants aged between 18 to 41 years travelling alone or with family must provide the last six months' bank statements with each month's balance not less than $10000 (or equivalent) in a single bank statement. If travelling with family, a joint bank statement is accepted; the closing balance must be US $20,000 or more each month. Marriage certificates for couples and birth certificates for children are mandatory requirements.

- Security Deposit equivalent to USD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).
- Past travel records for exemption of USD 1000 security deposit: Applicants who have Emirates Skywards Platinum and Gold member status, applicants who have travelled to UAE more than once in year and applicants travelled at least once in the last 02 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada and Japan. (Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport).
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Multi Entry Long Term Visa : 60 Days ]
- Kindly Note: The above visa is valid for a period of 58 days from the date of issue.
- (Duration of stay: 60 days, Visa fees inclusive of service charge and tax).
- Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is NGN 48585/- Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
- *Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances.
visa_types.processing_time: Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Multi Entry Long Term Visa-60 Days: This is a multiple entry visa and the first entry in UAE should be made within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 60 days. Within the period of these 60 days applicant can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However applicant should make sure his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 60th day.
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended maximum two times, allowed for 30 days each . Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services

Dubai International Airport

Terminal 3- Arrival Area

Next to Boots Pharmacy.
- Work Timings: 24/7 from Monday to Sunday.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Multi Entry Long Term Visa-60 Days: This is a multiple entry visa and the first entry in UAE should be made within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 60 days. Within the period of these 60 days applicant can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However applicant should make sure his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 60th day.
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended maximum two times, allowed for 30 days each . Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services

Dubai International Airport

Terminal 3- Arrival Area

Next to Boots Pharmacy.
- Work Timings: 24/7 from Monday to Sunday.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Multi Entry Long Term Visa : 60 Days ]
- Kindly Note: The above visa is valid for a period of 58 days from the date of issue.
- (Duration of stay: 60 days, Visa fees inclusive of service charge and tax).
- Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is NGN 48585/- Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
- *Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances.

## Mandatory Documents
- Nigerian nationals who hold a Tourist visa / Residence visa for any third country and intend to visit Dubai, must apply for and obtain their Dubai visa before departing Nigeria to the third country.
- Visa Application form duly filled must include an accurate address in the UAE, valid contact number and email address for the passenger.
- A photocopy of the confirmed onward or return Emirates ticket along with the passenger’s name with the arrival and return dates. It must match the dates on the hotel reservation. The passenger’s name and the period of stay should be highlighted in Yellow when submitting the ticket for visa application.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the main (bio) page of the Ordinary/Normal Passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period.
- The visa application form must include an accurate address in the UAE, valid contact number and email address for the passenger.
- For Non-Nigerian Nationals – Colour Copy of the valid CERPAC and residence Permit Visa.
- Applicants aged between 18 to 41 years travelling alone or with family must provide the last six months' bank statements with each month's balance not less than $10000 (or equivalent) in a single bank statement. If travelling with family, a joint bank statement is accepted; the closing balance must be US $20,000 or more each month. Marriage certificates for couples and birth certificates for children are mandatory requirements.

- Security Deposit equivalent to USD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).
- Past travel records for exemption of USD 1000 security deposit: Applicants who have Emirates Skywards Platinum and Gold member status, applicants who have travelled to UAE more than once in year and applicants travelled at least once in the last 02 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada and Japan. (Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport).

## Application Form
Click here to download the Visa Application Form
Instructions:
- The form needs to be filled offline.
- You are required to fill in all the details as mentioned in the form.
- Submit it with the mandatory documents at your nearest visa application centre.
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list.
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).

## Eligibility Criteria

- Nigerian nationals who hold a Tourist visa / Residence visa for any third country and intend to visit Dubai, must apply for and obtain their Dubai visa before departing Nigeria to the third country.
- Visa Application form duly filled must include an accurate address in the UAE, valid contact number and email address for the passenger.
- A photocopy of the confirmed onward or return Emirates ticket along with the passenger’s name with the arrival and return dates. It must match the dates on the hotel reservation. The passenger’s name and the period of stay should be highlighted in Yellow when submitting the ticket for visa application.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the main (bio) page of the Ordinary/Normal Passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel).
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period.
- The visa application form must include an accurate address in the UAE, valid contact number and email address for the passenger.
- For Non-Nigerian Nationals – Colour Copy of the valid CERPAC and residence Permit Visa.
- Applicants aged between 18 to 41 years travelling alone or with family must provide the last six months' bank statements with each month's balance not less than $10000 (or equivalent) in a single bank statement. If travelling with family, a joint bank statement is accepted; the closing balance must be US $20,000 or more each month. Marriage certificates for couples and birth certificates for children are mandatory requirements.
- Security Deposit equivalent to USD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).
- Past travel records for exemption of USD 1000 security deposit: Applicants who have Emirates Skywards Platinum and Gold member status, applicants who have travelled to UAE more than once in year and applicants travelled at least once in the last 02 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada and Japan. (Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport).

Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are based on Emirates ticket itinerary.
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.

visa_types.processing_time: Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
48 Hours Visa: This Visa is valid only for 48 hours stay (As per flight schedule - Arrival/departure time in Dubai). This is Single Entry visa. Ideal for travellers to the UAE who plan to stay for a period of less than 48 Hours. This type of Visa is preferred by travellers having business meetings or taking stopovers en route to their onward journey. The entry validity of the visa is for 30 days from the date of issue.
Please note that this visa is applicable for Male / Female with onwards flight only. The applicant also needs to attach the visa for onwards destination.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
48 Hours Visa: This Visa is valid only for 48 hours stay (As per flight schedule - Arrival/departure time in Dubai). This is Single Entry visa. Ideal for travellers to the UAE who plan to stay for a period of less than 48 Hours. This type of Visa is preferred by travellers having business meetings or taking stopovers en route to their onward journey. The entry validity of the visa is for 30 days from the date of issue.
Please note that this visa is applicable for Male / Female with onwards flight only. The applicant also needs to attach the visa for onwards destination.

## Visa Fees

visa_types.name: Tourist: 30 Days
visa_types.documents_required:
- Nigerian nationals who hold a Tourist visa / Residence visa for any third country and intend to visit Dubai, must apply for and obtain their Dubai visa before departing Nigeria to the third country.
- Visa Application form duly filled must include an accurate address in the UAE, valid contact number and email address for the passenger.
- A photocopy of the confirmed onward or return Emirates ticket along with the passenger’s name with the arrival and return dates. It must match the dates on the hotel reservation. The passenger’s name and the period of stay should be highlighted in Yellow when submitting the ticket for visa application.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the main (bio) page of the Ordinary/Normal Passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel) and Front/ External Cover page. Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period. If visiting Family or Friends: Provide a valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host, if the sponsor has an apartment with two or more bedrooms, UAE resident card.(Highlight the tenant's name in yellow).
- The visa application form must include an accurate address in the UAE, valid contact number and email address for the passenger.
- For Non-Nigerian Nationals – Colour Copy of the valid CERPAC and residence Permit Visa.
- Applicants aged between 18 to 41 years travelling alone or with family must provide the last six months' bank statements with each month's balance not less than $10000 (or equivalent) in a single bank statement. If travelling with family, a joint bank statement is accepted; the closing balance must be US $20,000 or more each month. Marriage certificates for couples and birth certificates for children are mandatory requirements.
- Security Deposit equivalent to USD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).
- Past travel records for exemption of USD 1000 security deposit: Applicants who have Emirates Skywards Platinum and Gold member status, applicants who have travelled to UAE more than once in year and applicants travelled at least once in the last 02 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada and Japan. (Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport).

- Emirates Commercial Visa Services

Next to Boots Pharmacy.

- For Non-Nigerian Nationals – Colour Copy of the valid CERPAC and residence Permit Visa.
- Applicants aged between 18 to 41 years travelling alone or with family must provide the last six months' bank statements with each month's balance not less than $10000 (or equivalent) in a single bank statement. If travelling with family, a joint bank statement is accepted; the closing balance must be US $20,000 or more each month. Marriage certificates for couples and birth certificates for children are mandatory requirements.
- Security Deposit equivalent to USD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).
- Past travel records for exemption of USD 1000 security deposit: Applicants who have Emirates Skywards Platinum and Gold member status, applicants who have travelled to UAE more than once in year and applicants travelled at least once in the last 02 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada and Japan. (Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport).

Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are based on Emirates ticket itinerary.
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
60 days Visit Visa (Tourist) : The entry validity for all types of tourist visa is 58 days from the date of issue (Valid until date mentioned on visa). After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended maximum two times, allowed for 30 days each . Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services
     Dubai International Airport

     Terminal 3- Arrival Area

    Next to Boots Pharmacy.

- Work Timings: 24/7 from Monday to Sunday.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
60 days Visit Visa (Tourist) : The entry validity for all types of tourist visa is 58 days from the date of issue (Valid until date mentioned on visa). After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended maximum two times, allowed for 30 days each . Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services
     Dubai International Airport

     Terminal 3- Arrival Area

    Next to Boots Pharmacy.

- Work Timings: 24/7 from Monday to Sunday.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Duration Of Stay : 60 Days]
- Kindly Note: The above visa is valid for a period of 58 days from the date of issue.
- (Duration of stay: 60 days, Visa fees inclusive of service charge and tax).
- Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is NGN 48585/- Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
- *Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances.

## Mandatory Documents
- Nigerian nationals who hold a Tourist visa / Residence visa for any third country and intend to visit Dubai, must apply for and obtain their Dubai visa before departing Nigeria to the third country.
- Visa application form duly filled.
- A photocopy of the confirmed onward or return Emirates ticket along with the passenger’s name with the arrival and return dates. It must match the dates on the hotel reservation. The passenger’s name and the period of stay should be highlighted in Yellow when submitting the ticket for visa application.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the main (bio) page of the Ordinary/Normal Passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel) and Front/ External Cover page. Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period. For 60-day single entry visa, Hotel booking should be 31days or more.
- If visiting Family or Friends: Provide a valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host, if the sponsor has an apartment with two or more bedrooms, UAE resident card.( Highlight the tenant's name in yellow).
- The visa application form must include an accurate address in the UAE, valid contact number and email address for the passenger.
- A colour copy of the valid CERPAC and residence Permit Visa is required for non-Nigerian nationals.
- Applicants aged between 18 to 41 years travelling alone or with family must provide the last six months' bank statements with each month's balance not less than $10000 (or equivalent) in a single bank statement. If travelling with family, a joint bank statement is accepted; the closing balance must be US $20,000 or more each month. Marriage certificates for couples and birth certificates for children are mandatory requirements.
- Security Deposit equivalent to USD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).
- Past travel records for exemption of USD 1000 security deposit: Applicants who have Emirates Skywards Platinum and Gold member status, applicants who have travelled to UAE more than once in year and applicants travelled at least once in the last 02 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada and Japan. (Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport).

## Application Form
Click here to download the Visa Application Form
Instructions:
- The form needs to be filled offline.
- You are required to fill in all the details as mentioned in the form.
- Submit it with the mandatory documents at your nearest visa application centre.
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).

## Eligibility Criteria

- A photocopy of the confirmed onward or return Emirates ticket along with the passenger’s name with the arrival and return dates. It must match the dates on the hotel reservation. For 60-day single entry visa, Hotel booking should be 31days or more.
- If visiting Family or Friends: Provide a valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host, if the sponsor has an apartment with two or more bedrooms, UAE resident card.( Highlight the tenant's name in yellow).
- The visa application form must include an accurate address in the UAE, valid contact number and email address for the passenger.

- Applicants aged between 18 to 41 years travelling alone or with family must provide the last six months' bank statements with each month's balance not less than $10000 (or equivalent) in a single bank statement. If travelling with family, a joint bank statement is accepted; the closing balance must be US $20,000 or more each month. Marriage certificates for couples and birth certificates for children are mandatory requirements.
- Security Deposit equivalent to USD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).

- Past travel records for exemption of USD 1000 security deposit: Applicants who have Emirates Skywards Platinum and Gold member status, applicants who have travelled to UAE more than once in year and applicants travelled at least once in the last 02 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada and Japan. visa_types.overview:
Overview
Multi Entry Short Term Visa-30 Days : This is a multiple entry visa and the first entry in UAE should be made within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 30 days. Within the period of these 30 days applicant can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However, applicant should make sure his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 30th day.
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended thrice for 30 days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services
            Dubai International Airport
            Terminal 3- Arrival Area
             Next to Boots Pharmacy.
- Work Timings: 24/7 from Monday to Sunday.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
96 Hours Visa: This Visa is valid only for 96 hours and is ideal for travellers to the UAE who plan to stay for a period of less than 4 days. This type of Visa is preferred by travellers having business meetings or taking stopovers en route to their onward journey. Visa is valid for 30 days from the date of issue.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
96 Hours Visa: This Visa is valid only for 96 hours and is ideal for travellers to the UAE who plan to stay for a period of less than 4 days. This type of Visa is preferred by travellers having business meetings or taking stopovers en route to their onward journey. Visa is valid for 30 days from the date of issue.

- Submit it with the mandatory documents at your nearest visa application centre.

- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list.
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).

## Eligibility Criteria
- Visa Application form duly filled must include an accurate address in the UAE, valid contact number and email address for the passenger.
- A photocopy of the confirmed onward or return Emirates ticket along with the passenger’s name with the arrival and return dates. It must match the dates on the hotel reservation. The passenger’s name and the period of stay should be highlighted in Yellow when submitting the ticket for visa application.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of Ordinary/Normal Passport main (Bio) page (Valid for minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel) and Front/ External Cover page. Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Confirmed hotel booking. Applicant’s name and check-in/out dates highlighted in yellow (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets).
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Marriage certificate for couples and birth certificate for children is mandatory requirement.
- For Non-Nigerian Nationals – Colour Copy of the valid CERPAC and residence Permit Visa.
- Applicants aged between 18 to 41 years travelling alone or with family must provide the last six months' bank statements with each month's balance not less than $10000 (or equivalent) in a single bank statement. If travelling with family, a joint bank statement is accepted; the closing balance must be US $20,000 or more each month. Marriage certificates for couples and birth certificates for children are mandatory requirements.
- Security Deposit equivalent to USD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).
- Past travel records for exemption of USD 1000 security deposit: Applicants who have Emirates Skywards Platinum and Gold member status, applicants who have travelled to UAE more than once in year and applicants travelled at least once in the last 02 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada and Japan. (Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport).
Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are based on Emirates ticket itinerary.
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.
